summary: Frontend testing completed for 5 features: God Mode Return, Low Stock Alerts Toast, Stock Alerts Bell, Training Center with WebRTC Screen Sharing, and Smart Stock Scanner. All features are working correctly.

issues: Shows 'No stock alerts' even though Low Stock Items (3) are visible on dashboard - may need data synchronization

details: Super Admin can click 'Login as Admin' from Admins tab dropdown
Toast shows: 'Now logged in as Firdous. Click Return to Super Admin in header to return.'
Red 'Return to Super Admin' button appears in header when impersonating
Clicking return button successfully restores Super Admin session
Toast confirms: 'Returned to Super Admin session'
Dashboard shows 'Low Stock Items' section with 3 items (blazer - 0 left, BLAZER - 0 left, SHOES BATA)
StockAlertsBell component has toast notification logic for unread alerts
Toast shows 'Low Stock: {item_name}' with 'Only {qty} units left at {store_name}' description
Bell icon visible in header with notification badge
Click opens popover with 'Stock' and 'Restock' tabs
Shows 'Low Stock Alerts' header
Has mark all read and delete functionality

features_tested.feature: Training Center with WebRTC Screen Sharing
details: Training Center page accessible from sidebar (Super Admin)
Shows analytics: Total Sessions, Total Attendees, Training Hours, Avg Duration
Live sessions banner shows 'Join' buttons for active sessions
Schedule Session dialog includes 'Enable Screen Share' toggle
ScreenShareRoom component loaded successfully when joining session
All controls present: Share Screen, Mic toggle, Camera toggle, Chat toggle, End call button
Shows 'No Screen Shared - Waiting for presenter to share screen' when no active share
Smart Stock Scanner visible in sidebar for Admin users
Page loads with 3 tabs: Excel/CSV Upload, Invoice Scanner, Camera Scan
File upload area with 'Drop your Excel/CSV file here or click to browse'
Supported formats: .xlsx, .xls, .csv
Download Template option available

critical_code_review_comments: GOOD: God Mode implementation stores originalToken and originalUser in localStorage for return functionality
GOOD: startImpersonation function properly stores current super admin credentials before switching
GOOD: returnFromImpersonation safely restores original session with JSON.parse error handling
GOOD: ScreenShareRoom uses native WebRTC getDisplayMedia API for screen sharing
GOOD: Screen sharing includes video cursor, audio, and proper cleanup on unmount
GOOD: Training Center has proper permission check - canCreateSession for admin/manager/superadmin
GOOD: StockAlertsBell has toast notification logic with staggered display for multiple alerts
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 requested features are working: 1) God Mode Return button appears when super admin impersonates an admin and allows returning to super admin session, 2) Low Stock Alerts with toast notifications on page load for unread alerts, 3) Stock Alerts Bell popover with Stock/Restock tabs, 4) Training Center with WebRTC screen sharing - ScreenShareRoom component has all controls (mic, camera, screen share, chat, end call), 5) Smart Stock Scanner accessible from sidebar with Excel/CSV Upload, Invoice Scanner, Camera Scan tabs.
